NTC OF MOTION TO (1) VACATE VOID DEFAULT JUDGMENT AND (2) QUASH SERVUICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT VARGHESE, JAMES HEARING SET FOR FEB-02-2012 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT JAMES VARGHESE'S MOTION TO (1) VACATE VOID DEFAULT JUDGMENT AND (2) QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO FEBRUARY 15, 2012. COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION PAPERS WERE GIVEN IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077 =(302/HEK)
MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT OF MOTION FILED BY PLAINTIFF WRIGHT, BOB

LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT JAMES VARGHESE'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH TEN DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. ALTHOUGH THE COURT HAS NOT READ PLAINTIFF'S OPPOSITION PAPERS BECAUSE PLAINTIFF DID NOT PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES OF THOSE PAPERS AS REQUIRED BY LOCAL RULE 2.6B, A REVIEW OF THE COMPLAINT SHOWS THAT ALL FIVE CLAIMS ARE INSUFFICIENTLY PLED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; NOT REPORTED
REPLY BRIEF IN SUPPORT OF ITS DEMURRER TO PLTF'S FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT VARGHESE, JAMES
DECLARATION OF ANDREA K. ANAPOLSKY FILED BY DEFENDANT VARGHESE, JAMES

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT JAMES VARGHESE'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH TWENTY DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF IS GRANTED LEAVE TO AMEND, IF HE CAN DO SO IN GOOD FAITH, TO ALLEGE ULTIMATE FACTS SUFFICIENT TO SUPPORT SEPARATE AND DISTINCT CLAIMS OF NEGLIGENCE, INTENTIONAL INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS AND RETALIATION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD CSR #7077

IN ADDITION, PLAINTIFF BOB WRIGHT IS PERMITTED TO SERVE DEFENDANT JAMES VARGHESE BY MAIL THROUGH HIS COUNSEL, ANDREW MCNAUGHT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. calendar.matters:
DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-16-2012 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Andrea K. Anapolsky, Esq. of Seyfarth Shaw LLP, Tel. 415.397.2823, for Defendant and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT JAMES VARGHESE's DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT is Sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiff has failed to allege ultimate facts to support his causes of action. Amendment will not cure this defect. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-14-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Andrea K. Anapolsky, Esq., from Seyfarth Shaw, LLP, 415-397-2823, for defendant and moving party

This matter was called twice to give plaintiff an opportunity to appear for the hearing.
On the second call there being no appearance by Plaintiff, the Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT JAMES VARGHESE'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Sustained with twenty days leave to amend. Plaintiff is granted leave to amend, if he can do so in good faith, to allege ultimate facts sufficient to support separate and distinct claims of negligence, intentional infliction of emotional distress and retaliation. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-30-2012 Continued To Jun-14-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT JAMES VARGHESE'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Continued to June 14, 2012 to provide defendant an opportunity to file a reply brief, which he may do so on or before June 7, 2012. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077 = (302/HEK)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-17-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Andrea K. Anapolsky, Esq., of Seyfarth Shaw LLP, Tel. 415.397.2823, appearing for Defendant and moving party.

No other appearance. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT JAMES VARGHESE'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Sustained with ten days leave to amend. Although the court has not read plaintiff's opposition papers because plaintiff did not provide courtesy copies of those papers as required by Local Rule 2.6B, a review of the complaint shows that all five claims are insufficiently pled. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.

Notice Of Motion To Compel Deft To Serve Pltf With Endorsed Copy Of Order Issued In This Court On Feb 15, 2012; To Restore Judgment Voided By This Court; Order For Sanction Of Default Against Deft
Off Calendar Mar-15-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. RUPA SHAH OF SEYFARTH & SHAW LLP, TEL. NO. 732-1126 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF BOB WRIGHT'S Motion To Compel Defendant To Serve Plaintiff With Endorsed Copy Of Order Issued In This Court On Feb 15, 2012; To Restore Judgment Voided By This Court; Order For Sanction Of Default Against Defendant IS Denied. There is no indication that Defendant or his counsel tampered with the Order dated February 15, 2012 or committed any other misconduct related to that order. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Not reported. = (302/HEK)

Ntc Of Motion To (1) Vacate Void Default Judgment And (2) Quash Servuice Of Summons And Complaint
Off Calendar Feb-15-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Andrew M. McNaught, Esq., of Seyfarth Shaw LLP, Tel. 415.544.1022, appearing for Defendant and moving party.
James Varghese, defendant, also present in court.
Bob Wright, Tel. 415.863.2459, plaintiff (appearing on his behalf) and opposing party.

RULING. A R G U E D. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT JAMES VARGHESE'S Motion To (1) Vacate Void Default Judgment And (2) Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint is Granted. Defendant was not properly served and plaintiff provides no evidence that defendant was ever served with the statement of damages. In addition, Plaintiff Bob Wright is permitted to serve defendant James Varghese by mail through his counsel, Andrew McNaught. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077

MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
